channel.title: mantbytes
channel.description: Personal blog of a Computer Science student covering technology, geopolitics, and what I'm learning.

item.title: The Tech Industry's Pivot to Efficient AI
item.description: We are moving past the era of 'bigger is better' in Large Language Models. Small, efficient models are the new frontier.

item.title: The Chip Wars and Global Supply Chains
item.description: How semiconductor manufacturing has become the ultimate geopolitical chess piece of the 21st century.

item.title: Understanding Federated Learning in Healthcare
item.description: A deep dive into how federated learning is transforming privacy-preserving medical AI models without compromising patient data.
